issue_title: How to add alignment control to a title without losing style?
issue_body_preview:
I discovered mui-rte which perfectly links DraftJS and Material-UI, but I can't choose the alignment of the title block: the style is lost when the block is aligned.

Here my title : 
`{
            name: "Title1",
            icon:  <TitleIcon number="1" />,
            type: "block",
test_description_zh: 在 mui-rte 编辑器中，创建一个自定义标题块（如 Title1），然后对该标题块应用对齐控制（如居中对齐、右对齐等），观察标题块的样式是否保持不变。
expected_result_zh: 对自定义标题块应用对齐（居中、右对齐等）后，标题块的原有样式（如字体大小、粗细等）应保持不变，同时对齐效果正确生效，不会出现样式丢失的情况。
